# Scrollless

> A free screen time app for iPhone and Android that locks your chosen apps after a set timer and makes you take a short break before you can reopen them.

Scrollless helps people scroll less by putting a deliberate pause between them and addictive apps. Before you open an app like Instagram, TikTok or YouTube, it asks how long you want this session to be. You set a timer. When the time runs out, all your chosen apps lock together at once, then you wait through a short mandatory break before any of them reopen. Setting a time first turns phone use into a decision instead of a habit. The app is free and supported by light ads. A one-time in-app purchase removes the ads for good. Scrollless is available on both iPhone (Apple App Store) and Android (Google Play Store).

## Get the app

- iPhone: [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6761528098)
- Android: [Download on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=ch.scrollless&hl=en)

## Pages

- [Home](https://scrollless.ch/): What Scrollless is, how it works, and where to download it.
- [How It Works](https://scrollless.ch/how-it-works): Step by step walkthrough of the timer, the shared lock, and the break.
- [Blog: Stop Doomscrolling](https://scrollless.ch/blog/stop-doomscrolling): What doomscrolling is, why daily limits fail, and what works instead.
- [Troubleshoot](https://scrollless.ch/troubleshoot): Common issues and fixes on iPhone and Android.
- [Troubleshoot: Xiaomi](https://scrollless.ch/troubleshoot/xiaomi.html): Setup steps for Xiaomi phones on MIUI and HyperOS.
- [Terms of Service](https://scrollless.ch/terms): Usage terms.
- [Privacy Policy](https://scrollless.ch/privacy): How your data is handled.
